response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Lyrics match reference perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Fully used reference lyrics, manual transcription for the chat portion. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings aligned strictly with vocal bursts, with immediate transition gaps to avoid delay.

subtitles.original: どうせ誰も聴いてないさ
subtitles.english: Nobody's listening anyway.

subtitles.original: 音楽なんて全部ファッション 音亡喰らって選手退場ワンナイ
subtitles.english: Music is just fashion, take the blow and exit, one night.

subtitles.original: どうせ何も伝えてなんかないさ
subtitles.english: You're not conveying anything anyway.

subtitles.original: なんとかトック撮って売名 あんな気取っておいて最低グンナイ
subtitles.english: Doing whatever Tok to gain fame, acting all cool, you're the worst, good night.

subtitles.original: どうしたってどうみたって尊師達でもう大渋滞
subtitles.english: No matter how you look at it, it's crowded with gurus.

subtitles.original: それでもあっち、こっち、そっち、ぼっち、卍、Zエイジ
subtitles.english: Still, here, there, everywhere, alone, Z-generation.

subtitles.original: 猿も欲しがるパンチライン欲しいの 意味とかどっちだっていいよ元々
subtitles.english: Even monkeys want a punchline, who cares about the meaning.

subtitles.original: 歌詞とかどうでもいいのでノれるの下さい
subtitles.english: Lyrics don't matter, just give me something to vibe to.

subtitles.original: さあ皆で笑いましょう 芸術より数の大小？
subtitles.english: Come on, let's all laugh, size of numbers over art?

subtitles.original: ヴァイラスに酷い代償 じゃあどうすんの？
subtitles.english: A terrible price for the virus, so what are you gonna do?

subtitles.original: それでいいんだっけ？
subtitles.english: Is that really okay?

subtitles.original: 頭は空回り タヒんでいく
subtitles.english: My head spins in circles, dying out.

subtitles.original: (I found myself instead) ふざけるな
subtitles.english: (I found myself instead) Don't mess around!

subtitles.original: バイバイ バズメロディ
subtitles.english: Bye-bye, buzz melody.

subtitles.original: 疑えよ大概 嘘ばかり
subtitles.english: Doubt it, most of it is just lies.

subtitles.original: 化けんな幻想でも理想でも良い
subtitles.english: Don't turn into a phantom, fantasy or ideal is fine.

subtitles.original: 君の歌いたかった物はどうしたんだい？
subtitles.english: What happened to the thing you wanted to sing?

subtitles.original: ぶざまでもオーライ 嘘じゃない
subtitles.english: Even if it's pathetic, it's alright, it's not a lie.

subtitles.original: お金や擬奏で満たす前に
subtitles.english: Before filling yourself with money or fake play.

subtitles.original: 負けんな覚醒せよ鼓動達よ
subtitles.english: Don't lose, awaken, you beating hearts.

subtitles.original: 君の伝えたかった物はどうしたんだい？
subtitles.english: What happened to the thing you wanted to convey?

subtitles.original: 意味わかんねぇ！
subtitles.english: I don't get it!

subtitles.original: お書きになったそんな音楽は現在使われておりません。ポップソング、ヒットソング聴いて、もう一度お書き直しください。
subtitles.english: The music you have written is not currently in use. Please listen to pop songs, hit songs, and rewrite it.

subtitles.original: あーもうハイカラ作家ばっか洒落くさいわ はぁ…
subtitles.english: Ah, all these trendy writers are so annoying, sigh...

subtitles.original: どいつもこいつもそいつもあいつも意味わかんねぇ！
subtitles.english: Every single one of them makes no sense!

subtitles.english: Lyrics don't matter, just give me something that will grow.

subtitles.english: I don't get it! I don't get it at all!

subtitles.original: せーの
subtitles.english: Ready, set...

subtitles.original: すーちゃんお誕生日おめでとう！ / ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Happy Birthday, Suu-chan! / Thank you!

subtitles.original: おめでとう！やったー！
subtitles.english: Congratulations! Yay!

subtitles.original: 何歳になったわけ？
subtitles.english: How old did you turn?

subtitles.original: 20歳バージョン2！
subtitles.english: 20 years old, version 2!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！ありがとう！ちょっとみんなせっかく来て...
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you! Guys, since you came all this way...

subtitles.original: ありがとう！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you!

subtitles.original: あんた転ぶでしょ
subtitles.english: You're going to fall.

subtitles.original: でもさ、今日の主役ですから、みずみあは！
subtitles.english: But you know, Mizumia is today's main star!

subtitles.original: みんなに一言言ってね、去ってもらおうかなって
subtitles.english: Let's have everyone say a word before they leave.

subtitles.original: 一人ずつ、ほら、すーに愛をね、一言言ってね
subtitles.english: One by one, show Suu some love with a brief message.

subtitles.original: 誰から？ほら / いや / うん
subtitles.english: Who's first? Come on. / No. / Yeah.

subtitles.original: ママだよ。
subtitles.english: I'm your mama.

subtitles.original: おめでとう！おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Congratulations! Congratulations!

subtitles.original: もうほらちゃんと聞いて。
subtitles.english: Come on, listen properly.

subtitles.original: 変な人いて怖かったでしょ。
subtitles.english: It was scary with weird people around, right?

subtitles.original: ママだよ。違うよ、違うよ！
subtitles.english: I'm your mama. No, you're not! No, you're not!

subtitles.original: ほら、残りの二人、残りの二人！
subtitles.english: Look, the remaining two! The remaining two!

subtitles.original: 俺がママだ！ちょっと待って、ちょっと待って！
subtitles.english: I am the mama! Wait a minute, wait a minute!

subtitles.original: 別に芸能事務所のそれじゃないのよ、芸人じゃないのよ。
subtitles.english: This isn't an entertainment agency, we are not comedians!

subtitles.original: これからもお姉ちゃんに頼ってね！
subtitles.english: Keep relying on your big sister from now on!

subtitles.original: お姉ちゃんと思ってるの？本当に。おかしいよ！
subtitles.english: Do you really think of her as a big sister? That's weird!

subtitles.original: ほら、ちゃんと、ほら、愛をね、最後に。
subtitles.english: Come on, show some love at the end.
